headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on W.W. Grainger, Raises Price Target to $1300
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $1190 to $1300.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
